description: Align the Rust integration test framework's golden file pipeline, normalizers, and IntegrationTest DSL with the Go CLI's exact behavior so that golden files can serve as cross-CLI references.

userStories.title: Add Missing Normalizers Part 1: TargetedHash, TargetedGitCommit, LineClearArtifact, Debug
userStories.description: As a test author, I want TargetedHashNormalizer, TargetedGitCommitNormalizer, LineClearArtifactNormalizer, and DebugNormalizer structs so that the Rust framework has all targeted normalizers from Go's normalizers.go.
acceptanceCriteria: Each normalizer struct implements the Normalizer trait with unit tests covering match and no-match cases

TargetedHashNormalizer only matches hashes after Tx:, Hash:, Init Code Hash:, or Bytecode Hash: prefixes using regex `(Tx|Hash|Init Code Hash|Bytecode Hash): 0x[a-fA-F0-9]{64}` and replaces with `$prefix: 0x<HASH>`
TargetedGitCommitNormalizer matches `Git Commit: [a-f0-9]{40}` → `Git Commit: <GIT_COMMIT>` and `commit: [a-f0-9]{7}` → `commit: <COMMIT>`
LineClearArtifactNormalizer removes literal `\r?\x1b\[2K` escape artifacts; DebugNormalizer removes entire `level=DEBUG` log lines via `(?mi)^level=DEBUG.*\n`
cargo test and cargo clippy pass

userStories.title: Add Missing Normalizers Part 2: ForgeOutput, Label, LegacySolidity
userStories.description: As a test author, I want ForgeOutputNormalizer, LabelNormalizer, and LegacySolidityNormalizer structs so that all remaining normalizers from Go's normalizers.go have Rust counterparts.
acceptanceCriteria: Each normalizer struct implements the Normalizer trait with unit tests covering match and no-match cases
ForgeOutputNormalizer handles: CRLF→LF, \r removal, Foundry nightly warning removal, compiler warning block collapse to `Compiler run successful!\n`, triple+ blank lines → double blank line
LabelNormalizer accepts a label string at construction and replaces all occurrences with `<LABEL>`

LegacySolidityNormalizer replaces `"bytecodeHash": "0x{hex64}"` → `"bytecodeHash": "0x<BYTECODE_HASH>"`, `"initCodeHash": "0x{hex64}"` → `"initCodeHash": "0x<INIT_CODE_HASH>"`, and `Gas: \d+` → `Gas: <GAS_AMOUNT>`
cargo test and cargo clippy pass

userStories.title: Fix Existing Normalizers Part 1: Address, Hash, RepositoryId
userStories.description: As a test author, I want AddressNormalizer, HashNormalizer, and RepositoryIdNormalizer to produce identical output to Go's normalizers so that golden files are cross-CLI compatible.
acceptanceCriteria: AddressNormalizer replacement is `0x<ADDRESS>` (preserves 0x prefix), not `<ADDRESS>`
HashNormalizer replacement is `0x<HASH>` (preserves 0x prefix), not `<HASH>`
RepositoryIdNormalizer matches `tx-0x[a-fA-F0-9]{64}` → `tx-<ID>` and `tx-internal-[a-fA-F0-9]{64}` → `tx-internal-<ID>` (no longer uses UUID pattern)
All existing unit tests updated to match new replacement strings
cargo test and cargo clippy pass

userStories.title: Fix Existing Normalizers Part 2: Timestamp, Version, Spinner, ForgeWarning
userStories.description: As a test author, I want TimestampNormalizer, VersionNormalizer, SpinnerNormalizer, and ForgeWarningNormalizer to match Go's exact regex patterns and replacements so that normalized output is identical across CLIs.
acceptanceCriteria: TimestampNormalizer uses `<TIME_AGO>` for relative times (not `<RELATIVE_TIME>`), adds `<UNIX_TIME>` for 10-13 digit sequences, adds standard datetime `\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}` → `<TIMESTAMP>`, removes date-only pattern
VersionNormalizer matches v-prefixed semver `v\d+\.\d+\.\d+(-[a-zA-Z0-9.\-]+)?` → `v<VERSION>`, treb short version `(?m:^treb [a-z0-9]{7}$)` → `treb v<VERSION>`, and `-g[a-f0-9]{7,}` → `-g<COMMIT>`
SpinnerNormalizer matches Go's bracket-based braille spinner patterns `\[[^\]]+\]` before Solc → `[*]` and collapses duplicate compiling lines
ForgeWarningNormalizer only matches the specific foundry treb-config warning line, not all Warning: lines
All existing unit tests updated to match new behavior
cargo test and cargo clippy pass

userStories.title: Align Default Normalizer Chain with Go
userStories.description: As a test author, I want NormalizerChain::default_chain() to return the same 10 normalizers in the same order as Go's GetDefaultNormalizers() so that default normalization produces identical output.
acceptanceCriteria: default_chain() returns exactly: ColorNormalizer, ForgeWarningNormalizer, LineClearArtifactNormalizer, SpinnerNormalizer, TimestampNormalizer, VersionNormalizer, TargetedGitCommitNormalizer, TargetedHashNormalizer, RepositoryIdNormalizer, DebugNormalizer
normalize() applies post-processing after all normalizers: CRLF→LF, trim leading/trailing whitespace, ensure trailing newline if non-empty
Broad HashNormalizer, AddressNormalizer, GitCommitNormalizer remain available as opt-in (not removed from codebase, just not in default chain)
Unit test normalizer_chain_applies_in_sequence updated for new default chain behavior
cargo test and cargo clippy pass

userStories.title: Align Command Output Format with Go Convention
userStories.description: As a test author, I want command output blocks to use Go's `=== cmd N: [args] ===` header format so that golden files follow the same convention across CLIs.
acceptanceCriteria: args is the space-joined argument list (not including `treb`)
Each command block ends with a double newline separator
cargo test and cargo clippy pass

userStories.title: Separate Artifact Golden Files and DefaultOutputArtifacts
userStories.description: As a test author, I want each artifact to get its own golden file and a DEFAULT_OUTPUT_ARTIFACTS constant so that artifact comparison matches Go's convention of separate per-artifact golden files.
acceptanceCriteria: DEFAULT_OUTPUT_ARTIFACTS constant matches Go's list: deployments.json, registry.json, safe-txs.json, governor-txs.json
IntegrationTest::with_default_artifacts() builder method sets output_artifacts from the constant
Command output golden file is named `commands.golden` (not `output.golden`)
Each artifact gets its own `{basename}.golden` file with normalized content; missing artifact files are silently skipped
run_integration_test no longer appends artifacts inline to command output string
cargo test and cargo clippy pass

userStories.title: Normalize Golden File Content on Comparison
userStories.description: As a test author, I want both golden file content and actual output normalized before diffing so that golden files remain stable when normalizer patterns evolve.
acceptanceCriteria: When comparing, both golden file content and actual output are normalized through the same normalizer chain before diffing
GoldenFile API supports passing normalizers for golden content normalization (or normalization happens in run_integration_test)
Round-trip test: a golden file with un-normalized content still matches if normalization produces the same result
cargo test and cargo clippy pass

userStories.title: Regenerate Golden Files and Verify Full Test Suite
userStories.description: As a test author, I want all golden files regenerated with the aligned normalizers and format so that the full test suite passes with cross-CLI-compatible golden files.
acceptanceCriteria: All integration tests pass with regenerated golden files (run with UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 then without)
No orphaned output.golden files remain (replaced by commands.golden + {artifact}.golden)
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes
cargo fmt --check passes
